title: Advanced ORM Features Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on raw queries, scopes, and custom model methods.

questions.question: What is a 'Scope' in the context of Sequelize?
options: A way to limit the visibility of a variable
A predefined set of query criteria that can be easily applied
A configuration for the database server

questions.question: When should you use raw queries?
options: For every query for maximum speed
Only when the ORM abstraction is not enough to achieve highly optimized SQL
When you want to avoid security

questions.question: Mongoose allows you to define custom logic on a schema using which of these?
What are lifecycle hooks in Sequelize used for?
options: To inject logic during model operations like beforeSave or afterCreate

questions.question: Which of these is a valid way to find an active user using a Sequelize scope?
